creator: hugo@leisink.net
text:
diff -u hiawatha-6.13/Makefile hiawatha-6.14.1/Makefile

 +++ hiawatha-6.14.1/Makefile    2009-06-08 00:29:21.000000000 +0000
 @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@

  PORTNAME=  hiawatha
 -PORTVERSION=   6.13
 +PORTVERSION=   6.14.1

  MASTER_SITES=  http://www.hiawatha-webserver.org/files/

 --- hiawatha-6.13/distinfo  2009-06-08 00:28:48.000000000 +0000
 +++ hiawatha-6.14.1/distinfo    2009-06-08 00:31:15.000000000 +0000
 @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@

 de290133f9d4766c27db6aedc5559883af3a5da7b0e7d97749a45ade74d7ae9b
